anti_claims: This skill JSON seed does not flip source authority away from the current skill markdown projection.
Resolved operated-standard and acted-on-kind edges are structural route mappings, not proof the skill is complete or used correctly by agents.
Absent mechanism or concept neighbours are residual pressure, not evidence that no such neighbours exist.
Generated graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omitted: mechanism or concept neighbours not named by typed source mapping
omission_receipt.reason: Skill instance preserves public-safe markdown source identity, digest, and typed route mapping only. JSON parity does not prove full skill-body completeness or runtime correctness.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Bind skill.uses mechanism and skill.applies concept edges only when source evidence names ids.

justification.summary: This markdown maps class-level public-runtime-organ-standard propagation to standards-meta diagnostics because those diagnostics bind accepted organs to standards, runtime contracts, validator refs, and receipt refs while preserving projection-only authority ceilings.

skill_payload.mapping_basis: This markdown maps class-level public-runtime-organ-standard propagation to standards-meta diagnostics because those diagnostics bind accepted organs to standards, runtime contracts, validator refs, and receipt refs while preserving projection-only authority ceilings.

statement: Microcosm Public Runtime Organ Standard Refine Standard And Propagate
title: Microcosm Public Runtime Organ Standard Refine Standard And Propagate
triggers: A reusable invariant about public runtime organ standard contracts, source-module manifests, validator refs, receipt refs, authority ceilings, public/private boundary, paper-module capsule binding, or mechanism binding belongs at the class level.

Changing the class expectation affects all accepted standards that declare the shared microcosm_public_runtime_organ_standard triad and therefore must propagate through validators, receipts, generated projections, and route/claim ceilings.
workflow: Prove the invariant from representative accepted standards, standards-meta diagnostics, source-module manifest receipts, paper-module capsule evidence, mechanism source refs, and validation receipts before editing standards or builders.
Update source standards, registry/builder/validator logic, and generated projections together so the class rule is computed and not asserted.
Leave unsupported release, provider, private-equivalence, runtime-correctness, whole-standard, or generated-projection authority claims as residual pressure until source evidence resolves them.
